lessons.title: Configure a Simulated Access Port
lessons.meaning: In a real device this enters configuration mode; in Lab Mode it changes only a simulated device state.
when_to_use: Place an approved endpoint port into the correct access VLAN
lessons.goal: Put Gi1/0/24 into VLAN 31 with a Finance-PC description.
good_output: Port is connected or intentionally down
Configuration is saved only after approval
bad_output: Verification does not match the goal
lessons.safety_warning: Only configure an approved port after confirming the VLAN, port, backup, and change process. This lesson never touches a real device.
lessons.practice_task: Enter the simulated command sequence, then verify the simulated port.
lessons.practice_output:
Simulated device
Gi1/0/24  Finance-PC  connected  VLAN 31
Configuration change applied in Lab Mode only.
lessons.hint: Start with configure terminal. The rest of the sequence is shown for study.
